Q4. Model

             actual predicted
actual    1.0000000 0.9939983

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ co_ug_m3 + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ug_m3, family = binomial, data = data_remove_outlier, 
    na.action = na.omit)

Coefficients:
              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept) -2.822e+02  4.855e+01  -5.813 6.13e-09 ***

benzene_ppb  2.259e+00  5.237e-01   4.313 1.61e-05 ***
nox_ppb      1.404e+00  2.423e-01   5.796 6.79e-09 ***
no2_ug_m3    1.657e-02  1.428e-02   1.160 0.245971    
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

(Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)

    Null deviance: 11824.965  on 8990  degrees of freedom
Residual deviance:    58.891  on 8986  degrees of freedom

lm(formula = aqi ~ co_ppm + no2_ppb + i_co + i_no2 + i_benzene +

lm(formula = aqi ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + nox_ppb + no2_ppb + 
    temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Q5. Sample Hypothesis’

H_0 (null): Pollutant concentrations have no effect on the calculated AQI

H_a (alternative): At least one pollutant concentration significantly predicts the AQI

[1] 120.2651
[1] 111.783
[1] -6.232367
[1] 1868.037

lm(formula = log(aqi) ~ co_ppm + nox_ppb + no2_ppb, data = train_data)
